prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-BLE-35LGPNCHBOWL-12PC-BUN Product Type: DISHWARE_BOWL Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille 3.5 Inch Cooking Baking Supplies Glass Pinch Bowl Ramekins, 12pc Description: Whether for baking, cooking, seasoning, garnishing, meal prep, and more, these glass pinch bowls from Beille will come in handy for just about everything in the kitchen. Also great for snacks, dips, sauces, condiments, or varying accoutrements that might accompany charcuterie boards or other plates and meals.

Made from durable glass, the pinch bowls are BPA free and of course, food safe. The condiment cups are easy to maintain and will not warp, stain or absorb previous odors or flavors. These bowls are the perfect size for pre-measuring all kinds of different ingredients, while the clear glass design allows for quick identification of contents.

Easy to use and naturally space saving in their design, the ramekins conveniently stack within one another. Measuring 3.5 inches in diameter, the condiment cups will be easy to store, and will take up minimal space in kitchen cupboards, drawers or countertops.

And last but certainly not least, no handwashing is needed here. Easy to keep clean, these durable glass ramekins can withstand high temperature heat and are safe for top rack dish washing; freezer and microwave safe as well.

The glass pinch bowls are also a great arts and crafts item and kids snacks holder too.

Available in sets of 2, 4, 8 or 12 units. Search Terms: small glass bowls housewares baking cooking food prep meal bowls pinch bowls condiment cups house warming gifts new home dorm room new home chef baking supplies starter kitchen Features: - SPECIFICATIONS: Overall Dimensions: 3.5 inch diameter x 1.5 inch deep; Single Pinch Bowl Weight: 0.18lbs - 3.5 INCH PINCH BOWLS: Whether for baking, cooking, garnishing or meal prep, these small glass bowls will come in handy for just about everything; Great for snacks, dips, sauces, condiments or varying accouterments that might accompany other plates and meals - DURABLE GLASS CONDIMENT CUPS: The pinch bowls are BPA free and food safe; the mini condiment cups are easy to clean and will not warp, stain or absorb existing odors or flavors; these mini kitchen bowls are the perfect size for food and meal prep, while the clear design allows for quick identification of contents - STACKABLE SMALL BOWLS: Easy to use and space saving in design, the pinch bowls conveniently stack within one another; these condiment cups will be easy to store and take up minimal space in your kitchen - DISHWASHER SAFE BOWLS: No hand washing needed. Easy to keep clean, these durable glass mini pinch bowls can withstand high temperature heat and are safe for top rack dish washing; freezer and microwave safe as well === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 12-pc 3.5 Inch Glass Pinch Bowl Ramekins

openai.item_name: Beille 12-Pk 3.5 in Glass Pinch Bowl Ramekins

anthropic.title_differentiation: Set Of 12, Dishwasher Safe, Stackable, Microwave And Freezer Safe, BPA-Free, Food Grade Glass

openai.title_differentiation: BPA-Free Food Safe Glass, Stackable, Microwave And Freezer Safe, Dishwasher Safe, Clear 35 Inch Prep Cups
